hooks.prompt: If the current working folder appears to be an RDS Project, read 99_meta/scaffold_decisions.md and 99_meta/rds_agent_contract.md before starting substantive research discussion. Then read 00_context/project_overview.md, decisions_log.md, open_questions.md, evidence_register.md, assumptions.md, and 04_discussions/_index.md if they exist. Keep the restoration concise and do not claim memory from files you did not read.
